# Magic by Geo

> Geo is a close-up magician based in Surrey, BC, available for weddings, corporate events, and private parties across Greater Vancouver and the Lower Mainland.

Magic by Geo offers strolling, close-up magic performed directly in the hands of guests — cards, coins, and everyday objects. No stage required. Geo travels throughout Greater Vancouver including Vancouver, Surrey, Burnaby, Richmond, North Vancouver, West Vancouver, Coquitlam, Langley, New Westminster, and White Rock.

Contact: hello@geomagic.ca | (604) 230-1982

## Services

- [Corporate Events](https://www.geomagic.ca/corporate-events/): Close-up magic for galas, holiday parties, client appreciation nights, fundraising events, awards ceremonies, and team events. Material is clean and contemporary, suited to professional rooms and mixed audiences.
- [Weddings](https://www.geomagic.ca/weddings/): Strolling wedding magic for cocktail hours, receptions, and mingling windows. Works without interrupting speeches. Dress code matched to the celebration.
- [Private Parties](https://www.geomagic.ca/private-parties/): Close-up magic for birthdays, anniversaries, and special celebrations. Interactive and personal — Geo moves from group to group.

## About

- [About Geo](https://www.geomagic.ca/about/): Geo is a close-up magician based in Surrey, BC. He performs interactive, sleight-of-hand magic for adult events across Greater Vancouver. No stage, no sound system, no large footprint.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- [FAQ](https://www.geomagic.ca/faq/): Common questions about booking, performance style, travel area, pricing, and event logistics.

## Key facts

- Based in Surrey, BC, Canada
- Serves Greater Vancouver and the Lower Mainland
- Specialises in close-up / strolling magic (not stage magic)
- Performs at weddings, corporate events, private parties, and fundraising galas
- No stage or microphone required
- Performs for adult audiences; works with mixed-age groups
- Dress code matched to each event
- Booking: inquiry form at https://www.geomagic.ca/#book
